items.title: YouTube adds new podcast features, including an AI recommendation tool and ‘Auto speed’
items.summary: The update signals YouTube's ongoing efforts to compete with other platforms for podcast audiences.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: CNN sues Perplexity over ‘verbatim’ copycat articles
items.summary: CNN has filed a lawsuit against Perplexity, claiming that the startup's AI tools generate "verbatim" copies of its work, as reported earlier by CNN. The lawsuit, filed in a New...

items.title: In FY26, 97% of violative ads were on digital platforms, 4/5ths of them on Meta: ASCI
items.summary: Despite regulatory interventions, offshore betting was the most violative sector with a bulk 6,933 cases, and was followed by realty at 643 and personal care at 576 cases
